pom.xml.general_idea: Set Maven compiler source and target to Java 17 to enforce compilation for the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the project would compile against Java 8, failing to utilize or enforce Java 17 language features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities with libraries requiring Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-javadoc-plugin source configuration to Java 17 to match the new JDK target.
pom.xml.why_exists: Generating Javadoc for Java 17 code with source level 8 causes compilation errors or missing documentation for new language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove animal-sniffer-maven-plugin configuration that enforced Java 8 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The plugin was configured to check against Java 8 signatures; keeping it would fail the build or be irrelevant for a Java 17-only project.
